forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -0,0 +1,3 @@
+color: 2da44e
+description: Ship the `kanban` CLI inside `Kanban.app` so installing the desktop app makes the CLI available on PATH with no separate install. CLI is bundled as a Tauri sidecar at Kanban.app/Contents/MacOS/kanban; exposed on PATH automatically via a Homebrew cask `binary` stanza (cask installs) and an idempotent self-install on app launch (DMG-drag installs). Windows deferred. Standalone `kanban` cargo-dist formula kept everywhere with `conflicts_with`.
+name: CLI bundled with App
reverse_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -1,3 +0,0 @@
-color: 2da44e
-description: Ship the `kanban` CLI inside `Kanban.app` so installing the desktop app makes the CLI available on PATH with no separate install. CLI is bundled as a Tauri sidecar at Kanban.app/Contents/MacOS/kanban; exposed on PATH automatically via a Homebrew cask `binary` stanza (cask installs) and an idempotent self-install on app launch (DMG-drag installs). Windows deferred. Standalone `kanban` cargo-dist formula kept everywhere with `conflicts_with`.
-name: CLI bundled with App
